practice.name: Canada 2015/1
practice.statement: Find all functions $f\colon \mathbb{Z}_{>0}ightarrow \mathbb{Z}_{>0}$, such that $(n-1)^2<f(n)f(f(n))<n^2+n$ for every positive integer $n$.

practice.name: IMO 2013/1
practice.statement: Assume that $k$ and $n$ are two positive integers. Prove that there exist positive integers $m_1 , \dots , m_k$ such that $$1+\frac{2^k-1}{n}=\left(1+\frac1{m_1}\right)\cdots \left(1+\frac1{m_k}\right).$$

practice.name: USAMO 2009/2
practice.statement: Let $n$ be a positive integer.  Determine the size of the largest subset of $\{ -n, -n+1, \dots, n-1, n\}$ which does not contain three elements $a$, $b$, $c$ (not necessarily distinct) satisfying $a+b+c=0$..
